svg.title: BigQuery Ecosystem Architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture diagram showing ingestion sources, BigQuery core layers, processing runtimes, and consumption layers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain BigQuery Storage Write API streaming ingestion in detail')
sendPrompt('How does Kafka or Pub/Sub connect to BigQuery for streaming?')
sendPrompt('Explain BigQuery batch load jobs including Parquet, Avro, CSV, ORC')
sendPrompt('What is BigQuery Data Transfer Service and what sources does it support?')
sendPrompt('Explain BigQuery Omni and federated queries across clouds')
sendPrompt('Explain the Dremel engine inside BigQuery including slots and serving tree')
sendPrompt('Explain BigQuery Capacitor columnar storage format and how it differs from Parquet')
sendPrompt('What is the BigQuery metadata layer including Spanner-backed catalog')
sendPrompt('What is BigQuery BI Engine and how does it accelerate dashboards?')
sendPrompt('Explain BigQuery partitioning and clustering strategies in depth')
sendPrompt('How does BigQuery clustering work and how many columns can you cluster on?')
sendPrompt('What are BigQuery materialized views and when should you use them?')
sendPrompt('How do I run Apache Spark directly on BigQuery using Spark serverless?')
sendPrompt('Explain Apache Flink integration with BigQuery using Dataflow or managed Flink')
sendPrompt('What is BigQuery ML and what model types does it support natively?')
sendPrompt('What are BigQuery remote functions and how do they call Cloud Run or Vertex?')
sendPrompt('What is Analytics Hub in BigQuery and how does data sharing work?')
sendPrompt('What BI tools connect natively to BigQuery?')
sendPrompt('How do I use BigQuery in a Jupyter notebook or Colab?')
sendPrompt('How do I connect to BigQuery from Python, Java or Go using the client libraries?')
sendPrompt('How does dbt work with BigQuery for data transformation?')
sendPrompt('Explain BigQuery IAM, row-level security, column masking and VPC Service Controls')
